name: Enter invalid data in book name in LYRASIS
fullName: Search libraries and books: Enter invalid data in book name in LYRASIS

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
And  Enter word @$ and save as 'info' on catalog books screen
Then  There is no results on catalog books screen
